channel.title: Meeple Digest
channel.description: Fresh takes for tabletop gamers and game-night hosts.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: solo board games
item.description: The persistent myths around solo board games, stress-tested against what tabletop gamers and game-night hosts actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your strategy in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying strategy project for tabletop gamers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/tabletopgamedesign is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the storage community this week.

item.title: The solo play checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified solo play purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of party games
item.description: The most common early stumbles in party games, and the cheap corrections that fix them for tabletop gamers and game-night hosts.

item.title: "game night hosting" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about game night hosting through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Ask the forge: your storage questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the storage questions tabletop gamers and game-night hosts keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in solo play with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest solo play adjustments that tabletop gamers and game-night hosts report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: game night hosting
item.description: The persistent myths around game night hosting, stress-tested against what tabletop gamers and game-night hosts actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your strategy in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying strategy project for tabletop gamers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about best gateway board games through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
